description_text: Autopark678 Item description Specification: Type: rear bumper lip, rear bumper lip diffuser Material : ABS Color : Black Dimension: Approx 21.8" x 19" (55.5*48.5 cm) Fitment: Universal Fitment, please measure your vehicle length and dimensions before purchasing, item compatibilities is for reference only. Package Included: 1 × Rear Bumper 4 Fins Diffuser Note: Please make sure to measure the location of application before purchasing.(Installation Is Not Included) Modification may be required to fit properly.
